title: Cisco ACI Spine-Leaf Fabric Latency (In-Fabric Forwarding Delay, NIR Flow Timestamps, Microburst/HBM Drops, Clock Skew)
exclusions: Leaf/spine **interface utilization** and sustained drop taxonomy (**UC-18.1.6**); **BD subnet pool** consumption (**UC-18.1.13**); standalone **VXLAN/VTEP overlay RTT** outside APIC-led fabrics (**UC-18.3.4**); VMware **NSX GENEVE** overlay path probes (**UC-18.2.9**); contract hit counters (**UC-18.1.4**); APIC cluster quorum (**UC-18.1.7**); multi-site orchestration (**UC-18.1.17**). This UC centers **in-fabric cell switching latency**, **NIR/Nexus Insights latency flows**, **eqpt*** hardware counters**, and **fabric clock skew**—not generic WAN RTT.
evidence: Saved search **`aci_uc1818_fabric_latency_health`** over **`index=cisco_aci`** (**`cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`**, **`cisco:aci:fabric_latency`**, **`cisco:aci:latency`**) plus optional **`cisco:nxos:nir:latency`** enrichment tiles wired with **`tok_pod`**, **`tok_node`**, **`tok_leaf_if`** drill tokens.
dataSources: `index=cisco_aci` (rename per governance) merging **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`** gRPC-fed **Nexus Insights Resources** flow timestamps (**ingress_ts_ns**, **egress_ts_ns**, **fabric_latency_ns**, **hw_latency_ns**) aligned with **`leaf_dn`**, **`spine_dn`**, **`epg_dn`** facets; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:fabric_latency`** exported cell-switching aggregates and **`fabric_pod_id`** roll-ups; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:latency`** REST or streamed summaries referencing **`fvIp`**/**healthcheck** probes; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:interface`** (**Splunkbase 4022**) pulled **`eqptIngrTotal`**/**`eqptEgrTotal`** byte/packet ladders plus **`eqptDropPkts`** for **HBM**/microburst proxies beside **`eqptIngrDropPkts`**/**`eqptEgrDropPkts`** breakdowns when TA exposes them; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog`** (**ETHPORT**, **INTERFACE**, **PTS**) correlated with **`fabricNode`** **`currentTime`**/**`unixDate`** skew banners; optional **`sourcetype=cisco:nxos:nir:latency`** when **NX-OS Insights** gRPC bridges leaf optics separately from APIC MO graphs; **`sourcetype=vmware_nsx:aci_crosswalk`** (optional CSV sink) tags east-west workload batches—never substitutes overlay probes but contextualizes bursts.
app: **Splunk Add-on for Cisco ACI** ([Splunkbase **4022**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022)); **Cisco DC Networking Application for Splunk** ([Splunkbase **7777**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7777)); **Splunk REST API Modular Input** ([Splunkbase **1546**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)) or Heavy Forwarder collectors hitting **`/api/node/class/`** latency-oriented classes plus **NIR** exporters; optional **Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector** HEC receivers decoding **`cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`** **Protobuf** payloads.
spl:
(index=cisco_aci OR index=cisco_network)
(sourcetype="cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:fabric_latency" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:latency" OR sourcetype="cisco:nxos:nir:latency")
earliest=-4h@m
| eval leaf_key=trim(lower(coalesce(leaf_dn,fabric_leaf_dn,fabricLeaf,"")))
| eval spine_key=trim(lower(coalesce(spine_dn,fabric_spine_dn,"")))
| eval pod_key=trim(coalesce(fabric_pod_id,pod_id,pod,""))
| eval ingress_ns=tonumber(coalesce(ingress_ts_ns,ingress_nsec,in_ns,"0"))
| eval egress_ns=tonumber(coalesce(egress_ts_ns,egress_nsec,out_ns,"0"))
| eval latency_ns_observed=tonumber(coalesce(fabric_latency_ns,hw_latency_ns,lat_nsec_cell_switch,"0"))
| eval latency_ns_calc=if(ingress_ns>0 AND egress_ns>ingress_ns,egress_ns-ingress_ns,null())
| eval latency_ns=if(latency_ns_observed>0,latency_ns_observed,coalesce(latency_ns_calc,0))
| eval latency_us=if(latency_ns>0,round(latency_ns/1000,4),null())
| eval eqpt_pkts_in=tonumber(coalesce(eqptIngrPkts,pkts_in_total,"0"))
| eval eqpt_pkts_out=tonumber(coalesce(eqptEgrPkts,pkts_out_total,"0"))
| eval eqpt_drop_pkts=tonumber(coalesce(eqptDropPkts,drops_total,"0"))
| eval eqpt_prev=tonumber(coalesce(eqptIngr_prev32,counter_prev_epoch,"0"))
| eval eqpt_curr=tonumber(coalesce(eqptIngr_curr32,counter_curr_epoch,"0"))
| eval wrap_hint=if(eqpt_curr<eqpt_prev AND eqpt_curr>=0 AND eqpt_prev>2147480000,1,0)
| eval burst_proxy=if(eqpt_drop_pkts>0 AND (eqpt_pkts_in+eqpt_pkts_out)>0,round(1000000*eqpt_drop_pkts/(eqpt_pkts_in+eqpt_pkts_out+1),3),null())
| eval nir_gap_sec=tonumber(coalesce(nir_export_gap_sec,nir_grpc_gap_sec,"0"))
| eval grpc_iv_sec=tonumber(coalesce(grpc_interval_sec,telemetry_period_sec,"5"))
| eval maint_txt=lower(trim(coalesce(maintenance_tag,chg_tag,"")))
| eval skew_warn=if(match(lower(" ".coalesce(ac_skew_banner,_raw," ")),"(?i)(skew|ntp|ptp|clock)"),1,0)
| eval latency_fault=case(
    isnull(latency_us),null(),
    latency_us>=500,"fabric_latency_us_warn",
    burst_proxy>=250,"microburst_drop_proxy",
    wrap_hint==1,"eqpt_counter_wrap_candidate",
    nir_gap_sec>=45,"nir_export_gap_bad",
    grpc_iv_sec<=1 AND maint_txt="","grpc_hi_freq_window",
    skew_warn==1,"fabric_clock_skew_context",
    sourcetype="cisco:nxos:nir:latency" AND latency_us>=200,"nxos_nir_latency_hot",
    null())
| where isnotnull(latency_fault)
| bin _time span=5m
| stats latest(latency_us) as latency_us_latest,
        max(latency_us) as latency_us_peak,
        max(burst_proxy) as burst_proxy_peak,
        max(wrap_hint) as wrap_seen,
        max(nir_gap_sec) as nir_gap_peak,
        latest(grpc_iv_sec) as grpc_iv_latest,
        latest(leaf_key) as leaf_key_latest,
        latest(spine_key) as spine_key_latest,
        dc(pod_key) as pod_cardinality,
        count as evt_cnt
    by _time pod_key latency_fault
| eval pair_story=pod_key." | ".latency_fault
| sort -latency_us_peak -burst_proxy_peak
| head 350
| table _time pod_key latency_fault latency_us_latest latency_us_peak burst_proxy_peak wrap_seen nir_gap_peak grpc_iv_latest leaf_key_latest spine_key_latest pod_cardinality evt_cnt pair_story
description: Splunk monitors **Cisco ACI spine-leaf fabrics** for **in-fabric forwarding latency** distinct from WAN RTT or overlay tunnel probes: **Nexus Insights Resources** (**NIR**) **latency flows** expose hardware-assisted **ingress→egress timestamp deltas** across **leaf**/**spine** forwarding pipelines; parallel feeds summarize **fabric_latency_ns**/**hw_latency_ns** at microsecond fidelity while REST snapshots retain **`fvIp`**/**APIC healthcheck** ping windows that bracket tenant mobility events. Operators correlate rising latency streaks against **`eqptIngrTotal`**/**`eqptEgrTotal`** packet ladders, **`eqptDropPkts`** spikes signaling **microbursts** or **HBM** pressure on **TenGig LAG uplinks**, **`fabricNode`** **clock skew** markers (**currentTime**, **unixDate**) when **NTP**/**PTP** adjustments perturb timestamp math, **gRPC export cadence** shifts (**5s** versus **1s** maintenance bursts), **NIR** exporter **backpressure** gaps, **counter rollover** suspicion on **32-bit** ladders, **EPG relocation** intervals where dataplane hashing swaps spine-facing paths mid-flow, and **NIR probe synchronization** windows where telemetry reorder resembles pathology despite calm dataplane queues.
value: East-west workloads tolerate nanoseconds-to-microseconds budgets inside modern **ACI** meshes—yet silent growth in **fabric_latency_ns** derivatives precedes TCP retries long before **`fvAEPg`** dashboards blush red. Splunk stitches **NIR flow timestamps**, **fabric_latency** aggregates, **APIC MO** clocks, **eqpt*** counters**, and optional **NX-OS NIR** mirrors so NetOps proves whether spikes arise from **microburst skew on bonded uplinks**, **telemetry cadence churn**, **counter wraps**, **PTP skew episodes**, **gRPC interval overrides**, **probe sync jitter**, **APIC-export stalls**, or genuine **cell-scheduler contention**—trimming war-room debates between virtualization and switching owners while preserving audit narratives referencing **CHG** bundles tied to **EPG moves**.
implementation: **Quick win:** enable **`cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`** into **`index=cisco_aci`** via TA **4022** or OTel **Protobuf** receivers—overlay **`fabric_pod_id`** tags—then chart **`latency_us_peak`** five-minute ladders beside **`burst_proxy_peak`** before expanding REST **`eqpt*** pulls.
visualization: (1) **Heatmap** — **`pod_key`** × **`latency_fault`** colored by **`latency_us_peak`**. (2) **Timechart** — **`latency_us_latest`** versus **`burst_proxy_peak`** dual axis. (3) **Single value** — worst **`latency_us_peak`** with **`pair_story`** subtitle. (4) **Table** — **`wrap_seen`**, **`nir_gap_peak`**, **`grpc_iv_latest`** per **`pod_key`**. (5) **Scatter** — **`latency_us_peak`** vs **`evt_cnt`** highlighting **`fabric_clock_skew_context`** buckets.
schema: CIM **Performance** hosts **`latency`**/**duration_us** overlays keyed by **`pod_key`**, **`leaf_dn`**, **`host`** aliases sourced from **`fabricNode`**/`mgmt0` fingerprints.
dataModelAcceleration: Accelerate **Performance** once **`FIELDALIAS`** maps **`fabric_latency_ns`** into **`duration`** semantics aligned with **`host`**/**`pod`** facets.

references.title: Cisco DC Networking Application for Splunk (Splunkbase 7777)
Cisco Nexus Dashboard Insights API Overview — telemetry widgets
Cisco Nexus 9000 ACI-mode latency troubleshooting references
Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector — Protobuf decoding guidance

knownFalsePositives:
**microburst_lag_uplink_skew** — Approved spine-facing **LAG** rescans sometimes reshape hashed member utilization for tens of seconds while microburst-sensitive counters spike without sustained **`fabric_latency_ns`** growth; anchor macros to **`CHG`** bundles referencing leaf uplink rebalance scopes before blaming scheduler starvation outright.

**eqptIngr_counter_wrap** — Thirty-two-bit **`eqptIngrTotal`** ladders roll during maintenance-window traffic ramps yet **`latency_ns`** histograms remain flat while **`wrap_seen`** toggles—pair rollover hints with **`latency_us_peak`** streaks spanning multiple buckets rather than isolated wraps.

**nir_grpc_backpressure_window** — **NIR** exporters briefly pause **gRPC** streams during collector upgrades—**`nir_gap_sec`** climbs without dataplane contention—suppress **`latency_fault`** lanes tagged **`nir_export_gap_bad`** whenever Heavy Forwarder **`splunkd.log`** lists rotated certificates concurrently.

**ptp_skew_adjustment_event** — Campus **PTP** steering injects **`fabric_clock_skew_context`** bursts altering ingress→egress deltas although spine buffers remain idle—cross-check **`fabricNode`** **`unixDate`** deltas against **`skew_warn`** arcs tied to timing decks.

**grpc_interval_change_window** — Telemetry engineers intentionally shift dial-out cadence (**30s→5s**) for hotspot pods—**`grpc_iv_sec`** swings mimic pathology unless dashboards annotate **`grpc_hi_freq_window`** suppress tokens referencing observability **`CHG`** identifiers.

**epg_relocation_path_swap** — Mobility crews relocate **`fvCEp`** attachments across leaf pairs—temporary **`latency_ns`** dispersion reflects hashing churn rather than persistent congestion—bind **`latency_fault`** escalations to absent **`CHG`** approvals referencing stretched VLAN migrations.

**nir_probe_sync_window** — Hardware-assisted probes occasionally reorder arrival timestamps during **`nir_probe_sync_window`** firmware transitions—latency deltas spike once while **`burst_proxy_peak`** stays dormant—confirm **`INTERFACE`** syslog silence before escalating optics replacements.
detailedImplementation:
**Prerequisites**
• Install Splunk_TA_cisco-aci ([Splunkbase **4022**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022)) wherever **`cisco:aci:syslog`** terminates and provision HTTPS collectors authenticated via **`aaaLogin.json`** / **`aaaRefresh.json`** (~10 minute cadence).
• Heavy Forwarders must reach **`https://<apic>/api/node/class/`** for **`fabricNode`**, **`fvRsHealth*`**, `fvIp`, **`eqptIngrTotal`**, **`eqptEgrTotal`**, **`eqptDropPkts`** managed-object pulls scoped under **`topology/pod-{pod}/node-{node}`** hierarchies.
• Stand up **Nexus Insights Resources** exporters landing **`cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`** with **`fabric_latency_ns`** and **`hw_latency_ns`** on each row; decode Protobuf with Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector pipelines without stripping `leaf_dn` anchors.
• Separate RBAC identities: **`network-admin`** readers versus `aaa` mutation roles.
• Maintain CMDB lookups mapping `pod_key` to `rack_row` / `cage` so cabling escalations cite physical coordinates.
• Optional Splunk REST API Modular Input ([Splunkbase **1546**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)) templating parameterized `GET` cadences balancing APIC CPU (**60–300s**) versus freshness SLAs.

**Configure ingestion**
(1) Receive **`cisco:aci:nir:latency_flow`** over OTel gRPC (**TCP 4317**) or HEC (**8088**) while preserving **`ingress_ts_ns`** and **`egress_ts_ns`**; discard malformed rows lacking timestamps unless **`fabric_latency_ns`** already appears.
(2) Mirror **`cisco:aci:fabric_latency`** aggregates keyed by **`fabric_pod_id`** / **`cell_latency_aggregate`** and stamp **`collector_id`** metadata so duplicate Heavy Forwarders do not double-count **`latency_ns`** timelines.
(3) Poll `fvIp` health summaries into **`cisco:aci:latency`** whenever `fvCEp` mobility rehearsals coincide with latency hunts—tag `fvSubnet` scopes.
(4) Harvest **`eqptIngrTotal`** / **`eqptEgrTotal`** ladders via **`cisco:aci:interface`** ([Splunkbase **4022**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022)) and compute **`wrap_seen`** when sequential epochs imply **32-bit** rollover.
(5) Optionally ingest **`cisco:nxos:nir:latency`** when Insights collectors bypass APIC graphs yet `mgmt0` fingerprints still align with **`fabricNode`** identities.
(6) Sink optional **`vmware_nsx:aci_crosswalk`** CSV merges tagging noisy workload bursts—context only; never substitute overlay probes.

**Search design**
Paste the `spl` payload into **`macros/aci_fabric_latency_core`** once `index` aliases stabilize across **`cisco_aci`** / **`cisco_network`** tiers.
Treat **`latency_us>=500`** as a starter heuristic—many fabrics remain cooler; tighten once rolling **`latency_us_peak`** baselines mature.
Dedupe pager macros on `pod_key` · **`latency_fault`** tuples across four-hour windows unless **`fabric_clock_skew_context`** persists alongside **`INTERFACE`** syslog bursts.
Translate **`fabric_latency_ns`** to microseconds while leaving **`latency_ns_calc`** null whenever **`ingress_ns`** / **`egress_ns`** violate ordering guards.
Blend **`burst_proxy`** ratios (**`eqpt_drop_pkts`** divided by **`eqpt_pkts_in`** + **`eqpt_pkts_out`**) to spotlight nanosecond bursts missed by five-minute **`eqptIngrTotal5min`** aggregates (**UC-18.1.6** sibling scope).
Layer **`grpc_iv_sec`** overlays so **`grpc_hi_freq_window`** drills stay distinguishable from stealth **`grpc_interval_change_window`** shifts summarized under **`knownFalsePositives`**.
Optional `predict` overlays forecast **`latency_us_peak`** slopes anchored to **`fabric_pod`** `CHG` calendars excluding ISSU freezes.
Promote enrichment lookups tying **`latency_fault`** badges to `CHG` identifiers referencing **`epg_relocation_path_swap`** rehearsals versus stealth **`microburst_lag_uplink_skew`** bursts.

**Validate**
• Compare **`latency_us_latest`** distributions against Nexus Dashboard Insights latency widgets (**`/sedgeapi/v1/site_health`** derivatives) allowing ± one **`grpc_iv_sec`** skew bucket.
• On suspect leaf switches run **`show hardware internal buffer`** (platform-dependent) when **`burst_proxy_peak`** aligns with **`microburst_lag_uplink_skew`** narratives.
• Correlate **`fabricNode`** **`currentTime`** hops against **`skew_warn`** arcs tied to `ntp` / `ptp` tickets—not virtualization KPIs alone.
• Capture **`show telemetry exporter`** on NX-OS peers or APIC `audit` / `aaaModLR` transcripts proving **`grpc_interval_change_window`** approvals whenever **`grpc_iv_latest`** collapses unexpectedly.
• Archive `tcpdump` style `fvIp` captures infrequently—prefer sanitized `apic` REST exports respecting tenant confidentiality.
• Confirm **`wrap_seen`** spikes align with `eqptIngr` deltas approaching **2^32** rollover—not duplicated collectors doubling rows.
• Compare Splunk `evt_cnt` histograms versus OTel `Protobuf` decoder WARN traces whenever **`fabric_latency_ns`** blanks sporadically.
• Exercise Nexus Insights replay drills quarterly—capture **`site_health`** screenshots beside Splunk **`pair_story`** badges before auditors question dashboards.

**Operational runbook**
• Fire Sev-3 paging when **`latency_us_peak`** stays ≥500 microseconds across six consecutive five-minute buckets without `CHG` suppressions referencing **`epg_relocation_path_swap`** drills.
• Escalate Sev-2 whenever **`fabric_clock_skew_context`** coincides with **`INTERFACE`** syslog bursts—engage timing architects prior to cabling swaps when **`skew_warn`** aligns with **`ptp_skew_adjustment_event`** stamps.
• Publish Dashboard Studio workbook **`ds_aci_fabric_latency.json`** wiring `tok_pod`, **`tok_leaf_if`**, **`tok_fault`** drill tokens bridging **`latency_fault`** narratives.
• Weekly trending — summarize **`latency_us_peak`** histograms per **`fabric_pod_id`** for quarterly readiness decks contrasting **`microburst`** mitigation budgets versus **`eqpt_counter_wrap`** occurrences.
• Troubleshooting quick hits — HTTP **429** responses widen **`eqpt*` poll spacing; OTel Protobuf drift blanks **`fabric_latency_ns`**—inspect **`splunkd.log`** WARN traces referencing schema mismatches; duplicate **`collector_id`** rows inflate `evt_cnt` until joins dedupe streams; **`nir_export_gap_bad`** bursts usually coincide with collector rotations logged beside **`nir_grpc_backpressure_window`** commentary.
• Tie pager summaries to `CHG` repositories plus APIC maintenance banners before blaming cell-scheduler defects outright.

Fabric reliability engineering addendum — Treat NIR latency flows as directional evidence aligned with hardware timestamps rather than absolute nanosecond truth; combine Splunk timelines with APIC Fault logs plus Nexus Insights screenshots before declaring sustained pathology. Document collector timezone offsets whenever `_time` minus **`_indextime`** skew diverges beyond poll cadence expectations—often hints Heavy Forwarder saturation unrelated to fabric silicon. Record ISSU choreography identifiers beside Splunk dashboards so graceful supervisor rotations that momentarily widen NIR gaps do not masquerade as dataplane regressions during leadership reviews. Pair microburst proxies with optical power readings from sibling interface feeds (UC-18.1.6) when bursts appear without latency growth, signaling pure counter stress instead of scheduler issues. Maintain a living library of **`/api/node/class/`** endpoints your automation actually polls—unexpected MO omissions silently flatten Splunk joins while GUIs still highlight hotspots sourced from alternate collectors. During forensic retrospectives export anonymized samples proving ingress_ts_ns ordering invariants hold across overlapping replicas—telemetry duplication frequently emerges when collectors restart mid-export windows yet APIC retains coherent sequencing on authoritative REST pulls.

Governance cadence — Quarterly readiness reviews should reconcile Splunk latency histograms against Cisco-published mesh latency budgets documented inside architecture standards files; deviations justify capacity-funded spine augmentations ahead of procurement freezes. Maintain pager rehearsal transcripts proving on-call engineers acknowledge suppress macros referencing CHG bundles tied to microburst rehearsal scopes rather than fabric defects alone. Archive sanitized Splunk exports beside Nexus Insights CSV dumps whenever auditors challenge telemetry completeness—dual evidence chains accelerate approvals versus screenshots lacking raw timestamp provenance. When cross-functional bridges convene, require virtualization owners to cite east-west workload traces only after NetOps confirms no active ptp_skew_adjustment_event windows overlap the incident timeline—prevents mistaken accusations toward hypervisors during timing-controller drift episodes.

Expansion note — Tie **`latency_fault`** pager storms to `CHG` calendars plus **`fabric_pod`** readiness milestones whenever ISSU rehearsals overlap **`nir_export_gap_bad`** bursts so leadership sees deliberate maintenance versus stealth regressions.

Closing hygiene — Rotate collector credentials quarterly and archive signed export manifests beside dashboard PDFs so auditors trace **`latency_us_peak`** provenance without reopening Sev bridges.
grandmaExplanation: We watch how long packets really take hopping across your leaf-and-spine switching cloth—not the wider internet—so tiny slowdowns ring alarms before everyday apps stall or meetings fill with guesses.
hardware: Cisco ACI fabric (APIC, Nexus 9000 leaf/spine) with NIR / Nexus Insights for telemetry latency
